CCTV footage access is governed by the Data Privacy Act. Before IT can assist, the requesting party must: 1. Write a formal letter addressed to the Campus Director stating the exact date, time range, camera location, and reason for the request. 2. Have the Campus Director approve the letter. Once approved, IT staff will facilitate the viewing. An IT Job Request will also be filed so IT staff is informed.
